Many apple trees. Mostly small green tarts apples. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-August.
1407 E Napoleon Rd, Bowling Green, OH 43402, USA

Small clump of elderberry at the edge of the woods just off the shoulder of the road. Take care when harvesting because of traffic and bevause the elderberry stand is still small. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: June-August.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
2050 E Wooster St, Bowling Green, OH 43402, USA
You have to wade into the brush a bit, but there's a small clump of elderberry bushes. I harvest some flower heads in the early summer and you can barely tell. Falling Fruit season: June-August.
709 E Reed St, Bowling Green, OH 43403, USA

Small oak trees surrounding the parking lot, went to a couple trees and picked the lowest loosest ones, completely filled a medium takeout cup. Unsure of actual species. But the acorns looked most like live oaks. Access: Public.
1094 N Main St, Bowling Green, OH 43402, USA

Several trees in Kroger parking lot here near the Starbucks entrance. Good to Excellent yield, depending on the previous season. Better when it's been a wet season, otherwise the fruits may be shriveled. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-June.
